## Describe the bug

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Run `planr ...`
2. Provide input "..."
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages or screenshots if applicable.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04]
- Node.js version: [e.g., 20.11.0]
- OpenPlanr version: [e.g., 0.2.0]
- AI provider: [e.g., Anthropic, OpenAI]

## Additional context

Any other relevant details (config file, generated artifacts, etc.).
